title: stellaris verna
side_effects: Stellaris verna can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased heart rate, nausea, and dizziness. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extract can lead to severe allergic reactions, including anaphylaxis and respiratory failure. Additionally, prolonged use of stellaris verna has been linked to liver damage and gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and abdominal pain. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
